query:
You are working on the wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 25.01 (commit: a24e5d1d).

## Issue to Resolve

[Reader IA] Show lists directly on dropdown menu if there are 2 or fewer
We are currently grouping the Lists in a "Lists" submenu independent of the number of lists the user has, but we should only show that submenu when the user has over 2 lists.

So if the user has 2 or fewer, they should be displayed directly in the menu root.

![image](https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/assets/5091503/57e663d9-218f-4a58-a447-05a86406ea86)

Internal ref: pcdRpT-4tr-p2#comment-7237

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/reader/utils/ReaderTopBarMenuHelper.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

The codebase is at version 25.01 (commit: a24e5d1d).

## Issue to Resolve

conversation_history.name: read
conversation_history.content:
1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils
  2→
  3→import androidx.collection.SparseArrayCompat
  4→import androidx.collection.forEach
  5→import androidx.collection.isNotEmpty
  6→import androidx.collection.set
  7→import org.wordpress.android.R
  8→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTag
  9→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagList
 10→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagType
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.menu.dropdown.MenuElementData
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 13→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 14→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.indexOrNull
 15→import javax.inject.Inject
 16→
 17→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelper @Inject constructor(
 18→    private val readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig: ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 19→) {
 20→    fun createMenu(readerTagsList: ReaderTagList): List<MenuElementData> {
 21→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->
 23→                add(createDiscoverItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(discoverIndex)))
 24→            }
 25→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isFollowedSites }?.let { followingIndex ->
 26→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 27→            }
 28→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isBookmarked }?.let { savedIndex ->
 29→                add(createSavedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(savedIndex)))
 30→            }
 31→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isPostsILike }?.let { likedIndex ->
 32→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 35→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 36→            }
 37→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isP2 }?.let { followedP2sIndex ->
 38→                add(createFollowedP2sItem(
 39→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followedP2sIndex),
 40→                    text = readerTagsList[followedP2sIndex].tagTitle,
 41→                ))
 42→            }
 43→            if (readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 44→                readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isTags }?.let { tagsIndex ->
 45→                    add(createTagsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(tagsIndex)))
 46→                }
 47→            }
 48→            readerTagsList
 49→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 50→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 51→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag
 52→                    }
 53→                    sparseArray
 54→                }
 55→                .takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
 56→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 57→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)
 58→                    add(createCustomListsItem(customListsArray))
 59→                }
 60→        }
 61→    }
 62→
 63→    private fun createDiscoverItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 64→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 65→            id = id,
 66→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover),
 67→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_discover_24dp,
 68→        )
 69→    }
 70→
 71→    private fun createSubscriptionsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 72→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 73→            id = id,
 74→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_subscriptions),
 75→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_subscriptions_24dp,
 76→        )
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    private fun createSavedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 80→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 81→            id = id,
 82→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_saved),
 83→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_saved_24dp,
 84→        )
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun createLikedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 88→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 89→            id = id,
 90→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_liked),
 91→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_liked_24dp,
 92→        )
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    private fun createAutomatticItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 96→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 97→            id = id,
 98→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic),
 99→        )
100→    }
101→
102→    private fun createFollowedP2sItem(id: String, text: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
103→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
104→            id = id,
105→            text = UiString.UiStringText(text),
106→        )
107→    }
108→
109→    private fun createTagsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
110→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
111→            id = id,
112→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_tags),
113→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_tags_24dp,
114→        )
115→    }
116→
117→    private fun createCustomListsItem(customLists: SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>): MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu {
118→        val customListsMenuItems = mutableListOf<MenuElementData.Item.Single>()
119→        customLists.forEach { index, readerTag ->
120→            customListsMenuItems.add(
121→                MenuElementData.Item.Single(
122→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(index),
123→                    text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),
124→                )
125→            )
126→        }
127→        return MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu(
128→            // We don't need this ID since this menu item just opens the sub-menu. It doesn't
129→            // change the content that is currently being displayed.
130→            id = "custom-lists",
131→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists),
132→            children = customListsMenuItems,
133→        )
134→    }
135→
136→    private fun getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(readerTagIndex: Int): String = "$readerTagIndex"
137→
138→    fun getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(menuItem: MenuElementData.Item.Single) = menuItem.id.toInt()
139→}
140→

content.text: Let me explore more of the codebase to understand the menu structure and how items are displayed:

conversation_history.name: read
conversation_history.content:
1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.menu.dropdown
 2→
 3→import androidx.annotation.DrawableRes
 4→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 5→
 6→sealed interface MenuElementData {
 7→    data object Divider : MenuElementData
 8→
 9→    sealed class Item(
10→        open val id: String,
11→        open val text: UiString,
12→        @DrawableRes open val leadingIcon: Int,
13→    ) : MenuElementData {
14→        // Item element that closes the menu when clicked
15→        data class Single(
16→            override val id: String,
17→            override val text: UiString,
18→            @DrawableRes override val leadingIcon: Int = NO_ICON,
19→        ) : Item(id, text, leadingIcon)
20→
21→        // Sub-menu element that opens a sub-menu when clicked
22→        data class SubMenu(
23→            override val id: String,
24→            override val text: UiString,
25→            val children: List<MenuElementData>,
26→            @DrawableRes override val leadingIcon: Int = NO_ICON,
27→        ) : Item(id, text, leadingIcon)
28→    }
29→}
30→
31→internal const val NO_ICON = -1
32→

content.text:
Now I understand the structure. The `MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu` is used to create a submenu for custom lists. According to the issue, when there are 2 or fewer lists, they should be displayed directly in the menu root instead of being grouped in a "Lists" submenu.

Let me look at the test file to understand the expected behavior better:

conversation_history.name: read
conversation_history.content:
1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils
  2→
  3→import org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat
  4→import org.junit.Test
  5→import org.mockito.kotlin.doReturn
  6→import org.mockito.kotlin.mock
  7→import org.mockito.kotlin.whenever
  8→import org.wordpress.android.R
  9→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTag
 10→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagList
 11→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagType
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.menu.dropdown.MenuElementData
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringRes
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString.UiStringText
 15→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 16→
 17→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelperTest {
 18→    private val readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig: ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig = mock()
 19→    val helper = ReaderTopBarMenuHelper(
 20→        readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig = readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 21→    )
 22→
 23→    @Test
 24→    fun `GIVEN all tags are available and tags FF disabled WHEN createMenu THEN all items are created correctly`() {
 25→        whenever(readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()).thenReturn(false)
 26→
 27→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {
 28→            add(mockFollowingTag()) // item 0
 29→            add(mockDiscoverTag()) // item 1
 30→            add(mockSavedTag()) // item 2
 31→            add(mockLikedTag()) // item 3
 32→            add(mockA8CTag()) // item 4
 33→            add(mockFollowedP2sTag()) // item 5
 34→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-1")) // item 6
 35→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-2")) // item 7
 36→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-3")) // item 8
 37→        }
 38→
 39→        val menu = helper.createMenu(tags)
 40→
 41→        // compare the menu items one by one to check their indices
 42→        val discoverItem = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "1" }!!
 43→        assertThat(discoverItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover))
 44→
 45→        val subscriptionsItem = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "0" }!!
 46→        assertThat(subscriptionsItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_subscriptions))
 47→
 48→        val savedItem = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "2" }!!
 49→        assertThat(savedItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_saved))
 50→
 51→        val likedItem = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "3" }!!
 52→        assertThat(likedItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_liked))
 53→
 54→        val a8cItem = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "4" }!!
 55→        assertThat(a8cItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic))
 56→
 57→        val followedP2sItem = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "5" }!!
 58→        assertThat(followedP2sItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringText("Followed P2s"))
 59→
 60→        assertThat(menu).contains(MenuElementData.Divider)
 61→
 62→        val customListsItem = menu.findSubMenu()!!
 63→        assertThat(customListsItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists))
 64→
 65→        val customList1Item = customListsItem.children.findSingleItem { it.id == "6" }!!
 66→        assertThat(customList1Item.text).isEqualTo(UiStringText("custom-list-1"))
 67→
 68→        val customList2Item = customListsItem.children.findSingleItem { it.id == "7" }!!
 69→        assertThat(customList2Item.text).isEqualTo(UiStringText("custom-list-2"))
 70→
 71→        val customList3Item = customListsItem.children.findSingleItem { it.id == "8" }!!
 72→        assertThat(customList3Item.text).isEqualTo(UiStringText("custom-list-3"))
 73→    }
 74→
 75→    @Test
 76→    fun `GIVEN all tags are available and tags FF enabled WHEN createMenu THEN all items are created correctly`() {
 77→        whenever(readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()).thenReturn(true)
 78→
 79→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {
 80→            add(mockFollowingTag()) // item 0
 81→            add(mockDiscoverTag()) // item 1
 82→            add(mockSavedTag()) // item 2
 83→            add(mockLikedTag()) // item 3
 84→            add(mockTagsTag()) // item 4
 85→            add(mockA8CTag()) // item 5
 86→            add(mockFollowedP2sTag()) // item 6
 87→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-1")) // item 7
 88→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-2")) // item 8
 89→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-3")) // item 9
 90→        }
 91→
 92→        val menu = helper.createMenu(tags)
 93→
 94→        // compare the menu items one by one to check their indices
 95→        val discoverItem = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "1" }!!
 96→        assertThat(discoverItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover))
 97→
 98→        val subscriptionsItem = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "0" }!!
 99→        assertThat(subscriptionsItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_subscriptions))
100→
101→        val savedItem = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "2" }!!
102→        assertThat(savedItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_saved))
103→
104→        val likedItem = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "3" }!!
105→        assertThat(likedItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_liked))
106→
107→        val tagsItem = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "4" }!!
108→        assertThat(tagsItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_tags))
109→
110→        val a8cItem = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "5" }!!
111→        assertThat(a8cItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic))
112→
113→        val followedP2sItem = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "6" }!!
114→        assertThat(followedP2sItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringText("Followed P2s"))
115→
116→        assertThat(menu).contains(MenuElementData.Divider)
117→
118→        val customListsItem = menu.findSubMenu()!!
119→        assertThat(customListsItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists))
120→
121→        val customList1Item = customListsItem.children.findSingleItem { it.id == "7" }!!
122→        assertThat(customList1Item.text).isEqualTo(UiStringText("custom-list-1"))
123→
124→        val customList2Item = customListsItem.children.findSingleItem { it.id == "8" }!!
125→        assertThat(customList2Item.text).isEqualTo(UiStringText("custom-list-2"))
126→
127→        val customList3Item = customListsItem.children.findSingleItem { it.id == "9" }!!
128→        assertThat(customList3Item.text).isEqualTo(UiStringText("custom-list-3"))
129→    }
130→
131→    @Test
132→    fun `GIVEN discover not present WHEN createMenu THEN discover menu item not created`() {
133→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {
134→            add(mockFollowingTag()) // item 0
135→            add(mockSavedTag()) // item 1
136→            add(mockLikedTag()) // item 2
137→            add(mockA8CTag()) // item 3
138→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-1")) // item 4

162→        val menu = helper.createMenu(tags)

164→        val subscriptionsItem = menu

171→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {

190→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {

192→            add(mockFollowingTag()) // item 1
193→            add(mockSavedTag()) // item 2

268→        assertThat(helper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(savedItem)).isEqualTo(2)
269→

272→        assertThat(helper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(likedItem)).isEqualTo(3)
273→

276→        assertThat(helper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(a8cItem)).isEqualTo(4)
277→

279→            .children

281→        assertThat(helper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(customList1Item)).isEqualTo(5)
282→

284→            .children
285→            .findSingleItem { it.text == UiStringText("custom-list-2") }!!
286→        assertThat(helper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(customList2Item)).isEqualTo(6)
287→
288→        val customList3Item = menu.findSubMenu()!!

291→        assertThat(helper.getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(customList3Item)).isEqualTo(7)

294→    private fun List<MenuElementData>.findSingleItem(
295→        predicate: (MenuElementData.Item.Single) -> Boolean

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils
  2→
  3→import androidx.collection.SparseArrayCompat
  4→import androidx.collection.forEach
  5→import androidx.collection.isNotEmpty
  6→import androidx.collection.set
  7→import org.wordpress.android.R
  8→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTag
  9→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagList
 10→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagType
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.menu.dropdown.MenuElementData
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 13→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 14→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.indexOrNull
 15→import javax.inject.Inject
 16→
 17→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelper @Inject constructor(
 18→    private val readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig: ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 19→) {
 20→    fun createMenu(readerTagsList: ReaderTagList): List<MenuElementData> {
 21→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->
 23→                add(createDiscoverItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(discoverIndex)))
 24→            }
 25→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isFollowedSites }?.let { followingIndex ->
 26→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 27→            }
 28→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isBookmarked }?.let { savedIndex ->
 29→                add(createSavedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(savedIndex)))
 30→            }
 31→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isPostsILike }?.let { likedIndex ->
 32→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 35→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 36→            }
 37→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isP2 }?.let { followedP2sIndex ->
 38→                add(createFollowedP2sItem(
 39→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followedP2sIndex),
 40→                    text = readerTagsList[followedP2sIndex].tagTitle,
 41→                ))
 42→            }
 43→            if (readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 44→                readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isTags }?.let { tagsIndex ->
 45→                    add(createTagsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(tagsIndex)))
 46→                }
 47→            }
 48→            readerTagsList
 49→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 50→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 51→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag
 52→                    }
 53→                    sparseArray
 54→                }
 55→                .takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
 56→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 57→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)
 58→                    add(createCustomListsItem(customListsArray))
 59→                }
 60→        }
 61→    }
 62→
 63→    private fun createDiscoverItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 64→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 65→            id = id,
 66→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover),
 67→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_discover_24dp,
 68→        )
 69→    }
 70→
 71→    private fun createSubscriptionsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 72→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 73→            id = id,
 74→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_subscriptions),
 75→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_subscriptions_24dp,
 76→        )
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    private fun createSavedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 80→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 81→            id = id,
 82→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_saved),
 83→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_saved_24dp,
 84→        )
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun createLikedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 88→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 89→            id = id,
 90→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_liked),
 91→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_liked_24dp,
 92→        )
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    private fun createAutomatticItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 96→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 97→            id = id,
 98→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic),
 99→        )
100→    }
101→
102→    private fun createFollowedP2sItem(id: String, text: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
103→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
104→            id = id,
105→            text = UiString.UiStringText(text),
106→        )
107→    }
108→
109→    private fun createTagsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
110→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
111→            id = id,
112→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_tags),
113→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_tags_24dp,
114→        )
115→    }
116→
117→    private fun createCustomListsItem(customLists: SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>): MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu {
118→        val customListsMenuItems = mutableListOf<MenuElementData.Item.Single>()
119→        customLists.forEach { index, readerTag ->
120→            customListsMenuItems.add(
121→                MenuElementData.Item.Single(
122→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(index),
123→                    text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),
124→                )
125→            )
126→        }
127→        return MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu(
128→            // We don't need this ID since this menu item just opens the sub-menu. It doesn't
129→            // change the content that is currently being displayed.
130→            id = "custom-lists",
131→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists),
132→            children = customListsMenuItems,
133→        )
134→    }
135→
136→    private fun getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(readerTagIndex: Int): String = "$readerTagIndex"
137→
138→    fun getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(menuItem: MenuElementData.Item.Single) = menuItem.id.toInt()
139→}
140→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.menu.dropdown
 2→
 3→import androidx.annotation.DrawableRes
 4→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 5→
 6→sealed interface MenuElementData {
 7→    data object Divider : MenuElementData
 8→
 9→    sealed class Item(
10→        open val id: String,
11→        open val text: UiString,
12→        @DrawableRes open val leadingIcon: Int,
13→    ) : MenuElementData {
14→        // Item element that closes the menu when clicked
15→        data class Single(
16→            override val id: String,
17→            override val text: UiString,
18→            @DrawableRes override val leadingIcon: Int = NO_ICON,
19→        ) : Item(id, text, leadingIcon)
20→
21→        // Sub-menu element that opens a sub-menu when clicked
22→        data class SubMenu(
23→            override val id: String,
24→            override val text: UiString,
25→            val children: List<MenuElementData>,
26→            @DrawableRes override val leadingIcon: Int = NO_ICON,
27→        ) : Item(id, text, leadingIcon)
28→    }
29→}
30→
31→internal const val NO_ICON = -1
32→

 23→    @Test
 24→    fun `GIVEN all tags are available and tags FF disabled WHEN createMenu THEN all items are created correctly`() {
 25→        whenever(readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()).thenReturn(false)
 26→
 27→        val tags = ReaderTagList().apply {
 28→            add(mockFollowingTag()) // item 0
 29→            add(mockDiscoverTag()) // item 1
 30→            add(mockSavedTag()) // item 2
 31→            add(mockLikedTag()) // item 3
 32→            add(mockA8CTag()) // item 4
 33→            add(mockFollowedP2sTag()) // item 5
 34→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-1")) // item 6
 35→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-2")) // item 7
 36→            add(createCustomListTag("custom-list-3")) // item 8
 37→        }
 38→
 39→        val menu = helper.createMenu(tags)
 40→
 41→        // compare the menu items one by one to check their indices
 42→        val discoverItem = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "1" }!!
 43→        assertThat(discoverItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover))
 44→
 45→        val subscriptionsItem = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "0" }!!
 46→        assertThat(subscriptionsItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_subscriptions))
 47→
 48→        val savedItem = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "2" }!!
 49→        assertThat(savedItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_saved))
 50→
 51→        val likedItem = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "3" }!!
 52→        assertThat(likedItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_liked))
 53→

 55→        assertThat(a8cItem.text).isEqualTo(UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic))
 56→
 57→        val followedP2sItem = menu.findSingleItem { it.id == "5" }!!

 59→
